items.title: EMO: Pretraining Mixture of Experts for Emergent Modularity
items.content:
EMO is a Mixture-of-Experts model that enables modular deployment by grouping similar domain tokens with shared experts, achieving performance comparable to standard MoEs while allowing significant expert pruning without performance degradation.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/allenai/EMO
⬆️ 点赞: 4
items.ai_summary: EMO is a Mixture-of-Experts model that enables modular deployment by grouping similar domain tokens with shared experts, achieving performance comparable to standard MoEs while allowing significant expert pruning without performance degradation.

items.title: PianoCoRe: Combined and Refined Piano MIDI Dataset
items.content:
A large-scale piano MIDI dataset called PianoCoRe is introduced, featuring unified and refined open-source corpora with diverse performances and note-level alignments for music information retrieval applications.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/ilya16/PianoCoRe
⬆️ 点赞: 1
items.ai_summary: A large-scale piano MIDI dataset called PianoCoRe is introduced, featuring unified and refined open-source corpora with diverse performances and note-level alignments for music information retrieval applications.

items.title: StraTA: Incentivizing Agentic Reinforcement Learning with Strategic Trajectory Abstraction
items.content:
Strategic Trajectory Abstraction framework enhances long-horizon decision making in large language models by introducing trajectory-level strategies that improve sample efficiency and performance across interactive environments.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/xxyQwQ/StraTA
⬆️ 点赞: 10
items.ai_summary: Strategic Trajectory Abstraction framework enhances long-horizon decision making in large language models by introducing trajectory-level strategies that improve sample efficiency and performance across interactive environments.

items.title: GeoStack: A Framework for Quasi-Abelian Knowledge Composition in VLMs
items.content:
GeoStack is a modular framework that composes domain experts in Vision-Language Models while preserving foundational knowledge and enabling constant-time inference through geometric constraints on adapter manifolds.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/QuantitativeImagingLaboratory/GeoStack
⬆️ 点赞: 1
items.ai_summary: GeoStack is a modular framework that composes domain experts in Vision-Language Models while preserving foundational knowledge and enabling constant-time inference through geometric constraints on adapter manifolds.

items.title: Prescriptive Scaling Laws for Data Constrained Training
items.content:
A modified scaling law accounts for data repetition effects and provides compute-optimal training strategies for data-constrained scenarios.
⬆️ 点赞: 3
items.ai_summary: A modified scaling law accounts for data repetition effects and provides compute-optimal training strategies for data-constrained scenarios.

items.title: Generative Quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold Eigensolver
items.content:
Generative quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold eigensolver reduces classical computational overhead in quantum chemistry workflows while maintaining accuracy and improving convergence for strongly correlated systems.
⬆️ 点赞: 1
items.ai_summary: Generative quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold eigensolver reduces classical computational overhead in quantum chemistry workflows while maintaining accuracy and improving convergence for strongly correlated systems.

items.title: Beyond Semantic Similarity: Rethinking Retrieval for Agentic Search via Direct Corpus Interaction
items.content:
Direct corpus interaction enables more effective agentic search by allowing agents to query raw text directly, outperforming traditional retrieval methods in complex tasks.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/DCI-Agent/DCI-Agent-Lite
⬆️ 点赞: 46
items.ai_summary: Direct corpus interaction enables more effective agentic search by allowing agents to query raw text directly, outperforming traditional retrieval methods in complex tasks.

items.title: Audio-Visual Intelligence in Large Foundation Models
items.content:
Audio-Visual Intelligence represents a multidisciplinary field integrating auditory and visual modalities through large foundation models, encompassing tasks from understanding and generation to interaction, with unified taxonomies and methodological foundations.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/JavisVerse/Awesome-AVI
⬆️ 点赞: 18
items.ai_summary: Audio-Visual Intelligence represents a multidisciplinary field integrating auditory and visual modalities through large foundation models, encompassing tasks from understanding and generation to interaction, with unified taxonomies and methodological foundations.

items.title: BioTool: A Comprehensive Tool-Calling Dataset for Enhancing Biomedical Capabilities of Large Language Models
items.content:
A large language model fine-tuned on a comprehensive biomedical tool-calling dataset demonstrates superior performance in specialized domains compared to commercial alternatives.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/gxx27/BioTool
⬆️ 点赞: 0
items.ai_summary: A large language model fine-tuned on a comprehensive biomedical tool-calling dataset demonstrates superior performance in specialized domains compared to commercial alternatives.

items.title: The Scaling Properties of Implicit Deductive Reasoning in Transformers
items.content:
Deep Transformers with bidirectional masking exhibit implicit deductive reasoning capabilities comparable to explicit chain-of-thought methods across various graph structures and problem sizes.
⬆️ 点赞: 2
items.ai_summary: Deep Transformers with bidirectional masking exhibit implicit deductive reasoning capabilities comparable to explicit chain-of-thought methods across various graph structures and problem sizes.

items.title: KernelBench-X: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating LLM-Generated GPU Kernels
items.content:
KernelBench-X benchmark reveals that task structure significantly impacts LLM-generated Triton kernel correctness more than method design, while iterative refinement improves correctness at the expense of performance, and correctness does not guarantee efficiency.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/BonnieW05/KernelBenchX
⬆️ 点赞: 2
items.ai_summary: KernelBench-X benchmark reveals that task structure significantly impacts LLM-generated Triton kernel correctness more than method design, while iterative refinement improves correctness at the expense of performance, and correctness does not guarantee efficiency.

items.title: Sparkle: Realizing Lively Instruction-Guided Video Background Replacement via Decoupled Guidance
items.content:
A new dataset and benchmark for background replacement in video editing are introduced, addressing limitations in existing datasets through a scalable pipeline with improved guidance mechanisms.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/showlab/Sparkle
⬆️ 点赞: 1
items.ai_summary: A new dataset and benchmark for background replacement in video editing are introduced, addressing limitations in existing datasets through a scalable pipeline with improved guidance mechanisms.

items.title: TIDE: Every Layer Knows the Token Beneath the Context
items.content:
TIDE addresses limitations in LLM design by introducing EmbeddingMemory to overcome rare token and contextual collapse problems through context-free semantic vector computation and depth-conditioned routing.
⬆️ 点赞: 0
items.ai_summary: TIDE addresses limitations in LLM design by introducing EmbeddingMemory to overcome rare token and contextual collapse problems through context-free semantic vector computation and depth-conditioned routing.

items.title: When No Benchmark Exists: Validating Comparative LLM Safety Scoring Without Ground-Truth Labels
items.content:
Comparative safety scoring without labeled benchmarks relies on scenario-based audits with validity chains measuring responsiveness, variance dominance, and stability to establish deployment evidence.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/kelkalot/simpleaudit
⬆️ 点赞: 1
items.ai_summary: Comparative safety scoring without labeled benchmarks relies on scenario-based audits with validity chains measuring responsiveness, variance dominance, and stability to establish deployment evidence.

items.title: RaguTeam at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Meno and Friends in a Judge-Orchestrated LLM Ensemble for Faithful Multi-Turn Response Generation
items.content:
A heterogeneous ensemble of seven large language models with dual prompting strategies achieved top performance in the SemEval-2026 MTRAGEval task through judge selection and demonstrated the importance of model diversity.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/RaguTeam/ragu_mtrag_semeval
⬆️ 点赞: 35
items.ai_summary: A heterogeneous ensemble of seven large language models with dual prompting strategies achieved top performance in the SemEval-2026 MTRAGEval task through judge selection and demonstrated the importance of model diversity.

items.title: Balanced Aggregation: Understanding and Fixing Aggregation Bias in GRPO
items.content:
Balanced Aggregation improves reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards by addressing optimization biases in token-level policy gradient aggregation, leading to better training stability and performance.
⬆️ 点赞: 2
items.ai_summary: Balanced Aggregation improves reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards by addressing optimization biases in token-level policy gradient aggregation, leading to better training stability and performance.

items.title: RemoteZero: Geospatial Reasoning with Zero Human Annotations
items.content:
RemoteZero enables geospatial reasoning without box supervision by leveraging semantic verification capabilities of MLLMs for self-evolving localization from unlabeled remote sensing data.
⬆️ 点赞: 5
items.ai_summary: RemoteZero enables geospatial reasoning without box supervision by leveraging semantic verification capabilities of MLLMs for self-evolving localization from unlabeled remote sensing data.

items.title: When to Trust Imagination: Adaptive Action Execution for World Action Models
items.content:
World Action Models (WAMs) have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation by jointly predicting future visual observations and future actions. However, current WAMs typically execute a fixed number of predicted actions after each model inference, leaving the robot blind to whether the imagined future remains consistent with the actual physical rollout. In this work, we form…
⬆️ 点赞: 33

items.title: EDU-CIRCUIT-HW: Evaluating Multimodal Large Language Models on Real-World University-Level STEM Student Handwritten Solutions
items.content:
EDU-CIRCUIT-HW dataset reveals significant limitations in MLLMs' ability to accurately interpret complex STEM handwritten solutions, prompting a hybrid approach combining automated recognition with minimal human oversight for improved educational grading systems.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/gt-learning-innovation/CIRCUIT_EDU_HW_ACL
⬆️ 点赞: 1
items.ai_summary: EDU-CIRCUIT-HW dataset reveals significant limitations in MLLMs' ability to accurately interpret complex STEM handwritten solutions, prompting a hybrid approach combining automated recognition with minimal human oversight for improved educational grading systems.

items.title: Are We Making Progress in Multimodal Domain Generalization? A Comprehensive Benchmark Study
items.content:
MMDG-Bench presents a unified benchmark for multimodal domain generalization that standardizes evaluation across diverse tasks and modalities while revealing limited performance gains and significant robustness challenges.
🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/lihongzhao99/MMDG_Benchmark
⬆️ 点赞: 1
items.ai_summary: MMDG-Bench presents a unified benchmark for multimodal domain generalization that standardizes evaluation across diverse tasks and modalities while revealing limited performance gains and significant robustness challenges.
